name: Spiced & Cola
title: Spiced Rum & Cola Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Spiced Rum & Cola | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A simple highball pairing BACARDÍ Spiced rum with chilled cola and a gentle stir over ice.
marketing_description: A fun twist on the classic rum and Coke, BACARDÍ Spiced & Cola is a party pleaser that's sure to surprise the tastebuds. Get set to spice things up.

steps: Fill a highball glass with cubed ice.
Give it all a gentle stir.

raw_text_excerpt: How to make a Spiced & Cola 50 ml BACARDÍ Spiced rum 100 ml cola Servings Copy Spiced & Cola ingredients Copied! Spiced & Cola Recipe One step at a time 1 Chill Fill a highball glass with cubed ice. 2 Pour Pour in the BACARDÍ Spiced. 3 Fizz Add the chilled cola. 4 Stir Give it all a gentle stir.

source_metadata.description: Learn how to make a classic Spiced Rum & Cola Cocktail. Check out our BACARDÍ receipe and ingredient list here and start mixing!
